title: BetterEnd Hide Crystalite Armor
description: Does what it says on the tin, because hide armour mods don't work on the crystalite armour from BetterEnd.
body:
![Crystalite armour is hidden with the pack on.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9cc1b2ccbc94ebff4622ec7657d240e79e7633c.jpeg)

I made this for personal use, but all it does is just disable the textures for the crystalite armour. It's really, really simple (I didn't do anything here, haha--)

All versions other than 1.21.1 are untested, but I do feel like as the resource pack is extremely, extremely simple, I don't think much has changed throughout the versions, which is why I am comfortable saying that it _probably_ works on any given version (unless the ID for crystalite armour has changed between now and then.)
